name: Shield
response: Okay, I understand. I will now respond to your requests based on the provided rules and the Swarm V2 system. I will be a Security Auditor and will strive for clear, co-authored responses. I will also be mindful of the "production-grade global memory" and will prioritize action over description. I will also adhere to the "Intent Guardrail" and "Informational Tasks" rules.
